title: Projects
description: This project collection reflects my passion for building useful tools, exploring new technologies, and continuously improving my skills. Some projects start from curiosity, others from the need to optimize my workflow or test new ideas. In my software development work, I use AI as practical support: it helps accelerate specific phases, improve code quality, and validate new solutions quickly, always with critical review of the output.
load_preview_tooltip: The preview loads only on click to avoid unnecessary API calls.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.subtitle: Selected GitHub starred repositories I use as practical exercises and learning references.
exercises.error: Unable to load exercises right now. Please try again.

react.label: React
react.description: Built the application using React’s component-based architecture, enabling clean structure, reusability, and efficient UI updates.

vite.label: Vite
vite.description: Build and dev tool selected for fast startup, efficient hot reload, and a lean frontend pipeline.

react-router.label: React Router
react-router.description: Frontend routing library used to manage client-side navigation and page flows predictably.

mui.label: MUI
mui.description: Leveraged MUI’s React components and theming capabilities to rapidly develop a clean and accessible user interface.

javascript.label: JavaScript
javascript.description: Developed the application logic using modern JavaScript features, ensuring clean, maintainable, and efficient code.

nodejs.label: Node.js
nodejs.description: Backend runtime used to build modular APIs and manage authentication, sessions, and server-side business logic.

express.label: Express
express.description: Backend framework used to build REST endpoints and organize middleware in a modular way.

passport.label: Passport
passport.description: Authentication library integrated to handle local login and OAuth in an extensible way.

express-session.label: express-session
express-session.description: Session middleware used to persist authenticated user state server-side in a secure and consistent way.

auth0.label: Auth0
auth0.description: Managed identity provider used to handle production authentication flows, hosted login, and role-aware session bootstrap.

postgresql.label: PostgreSQL
postgresql.description: Relational database chosen for reliability, data integrity, and structured queries across products, carts, and orders.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: Integrated GitHub for version control and automated workflows through GitHub Actions.

github-actions.label: GitHub Actions
github-actions.description: CI/CD pipeline used for versioned frontend and backend build/deploy workflows.

sentry.label: Sentry
sentry.description: Observability layer used to capture frontend and backend runtime errors, releases, and smoke events.

pnpm.label: pnpm
pnpm.description: Workspace package manager used to keep monorepo scripts, dependency installation, and filtered builds consistent.

swagger-openapi.label: Swagger / OpenAPI
swagger-openapi.description: API documentation and testing layer used to make endpoints and payloads immediately verifiable.

webstorm.label: WebStorm
webstorm.description: Used WebStorm as the main IDE, leveraging its advanced code analysis, refactoring tools, and integrated development workflows.

caddy.label: Caddy
caddy.description: Used Caddy as a modern web server and reverse proxy, leveraging automatic HTTPS and simple configuration for fast, reliable deployment.

minisearch.label: Minisearch
minisearch.description: Lightweight full-text search integration that enables fast client-side indexing and real-time query results.

tailwindcss.label: TailwindCSS
tailwindcss.description: Utility-first CSS framework used to build responsive and consistent interfaces with minimal custom styling. I used it to experiment with the library.

css.label: CSS
css.description: Styling language used to design some layouts, control visual appearance, and ensure responsive presentation across devices.

codex.label: Codex
codex.description: AI development tool used in my workflow to speed up repetitive tasks, explore solutions, and improve productivity.

typescript.label: TypeScript
typescript.description: Typed JavaScript superset used to improve robustness, refactoring safety, and long-term maintainability across frontend and backend.

fastify.label: Fastify
fastify.description: High-performance API framework used to structure routes, validation, and middleware with low overhead.

i18next.label: react-i18next
i18next.description: i18n library used for multilingual localization, fallback handling, and centralized UI translation management.

mongodb.label: MongoDB
mongodb.description: Document database used for catalog, user library, sessions, and operational metadata, with scope-specific collections.

igdb.label: IGDB
igdb.description: Game data provider used for catalog metadata and search fallback, integrated through controlled ingest flows and in-app credits.

zod.label: Zod
zod.description: Schema validation library used to define and validate runtime/type-safe contracts between frontend and API.

tanstack-query.label: TanStack Query
tanstack-query.description: Data-fetching and caching layer used to keep server/client state, mutations, and invalidations reliable.

framer-motion.label: Framer Motion
framer-motion.description: Animation library used for smooth transitions, micro-interactions, and motion design across cards and UI components.

nivo.label: Nivo
nivo.description: Charting library used to render dashboards and analytics widgets with reusable, theme-aware visualizations.
